title: Kanom Buang with Smoky Caramel Sauce
description: A delicate Thai-inspired crepe filled with a sweet coconut and nutella filling, served with a smoky caramel sauce inspired by Indian cuisine. This dessert is perfect for warm weather.
instructions: Combine kanom, nutella, coconut oil, smoked paprika, and honey in a blender.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Pour 1/4 cup of the kanom mixture into the pan.
Tilt the pan to evenly coat the bottom.
Cook for 2 minutes or until the edges start to curl.
Loosen with a spatula and flip.
Combine heavy cream and powdered sugar in a saucepan.
Heat over low heat, stirring until the sugar dissolves.
Bring to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes or until the sauce thickens.
Serve the kanom buang with the smoky caramel sauce.
